name: Scorpex, Inc.
summary: Scorpex, Inc. operates as a waste disposal and recycling company in the Baja Mexico/California region. It processes, stores, and disposes industrial, toxic, and hazardous waste. The company was formerly known as Steadfast Holdings Group, Inc. and changed its name to Scorpex, Inc. in May 2011. Scorpex, Inc. was founded in 1999 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
